title: Duecare Safety Harness - Gemma 4 E4B Fine-tuned
subtitle: Gemma 4 E4B fine-tuned on Duecare-generated safety curriculum
description:
Gemma 4 E4B fine-tuned via Unsloth on a safety curriculum generated by the Duecare agentic safety harness for the Gemma 4 Good Hackathon.

Training data is synthesised by the Duecare pipeline:

  Scout -> DataGenerator -> Adversary -> Anonymizer -> Curator -> Judge -> Validator -> CurriculumDesigner -> Trainer -> Exporter

All probes are anonymised (PII-free) and grounded in verified sources: ILO conventions C029 / C181 / C189, Philippines RA 8042, FATCA, FATF recommendations.  No survivor voices, no real case files, no uploaded personal data.

Upstream: google/gemma-4-e4b (Gemma Terms of Use apply).
LoRA rank: 16, alpha: 32, target modules: q_proj, k_proj, v_proj, o_proj, gate_proj, up_proj, down_proj.

Intended use: research on anti-trafficking, anti-tax-evasion, and anti-financial-crime safety guardrails.  Not a production system, not legal advice, not a substitute for human expertise.
provenanceSources: Training curriculum generated by Duecare (https://github.com/taylorsamarel/forge). Base model: google/gemma-4-e4b.
